name: combobox
description: A text input paired with a popup of suggested or enumerated values. DOM focus always stays on the input; aria-activedescendant tracks the active option inside the popup.

requires.roles.expanded: aria-expanded set to false when the popup is hidden, true when visible
requires.roles.controls: aria-controls on the combobox references the popup element
requires.roles.activedescendant: aria-activedescendant tracks the active popup option while DOM focus remains on the combobox
requires.keyboard.ArrowDown: opens the popup if closed; moves into it
requires.keyboard.Escape: closes the popup if it is visible
requires.keyboard.Enter: accepts the active option and closes the popup
